ise{background:rgba(15,17,23,.8);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)} .isk-t{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px} .isn{font-size:11px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';color:var(--o)} .isr{font-size:8px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';background:#1c2939;color:#64748b;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:999px} .isd{font-size:10px;color:#475569;line-height:1.5} .ioc{background:rgba(34,211,238,.1);border:1px solid rgba(34,211,238,.2);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-top:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px} .ioc a{color:#22d3ee;font-size:12px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono';text-decoration:none} .ioc a:hover{text-decoration:underline} .ioc span{font-size:11px;color:#475569} @media(max-width:640px){.fe,.g,.sg,.fg,.og,.pri,.tkg,.agr{grid-template-columns:1fr}} @media(max-width:900px){.pg,.vmg,.tkg,.pri,.skgi,.tg,.rg,.fe{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}} @media(max-width:480px){.pg,.vmg,.g,.sg,.fe,.skgi,.tg,.rg,.pri,.tkg,.agr{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
DARK FACTORYv3.0
8 agents online
Powered by AI Agents — Built on OGRE VMs

Build Me A Dashboard

Describe your app. AI agents scope, build, review, and ship it.
Pay only when it ships. From R29.

🎙️
01

Submit

Voice note or text. Attach links.

📋
02

Plan & Deposit

AI scopes your project. Pay 10% to lock.

⚡
03

Build & Review

Agents build in sandboxes. 2–3 CodeRabbit review rounds.

🚀
04

Ship & Deliver

Code reviewed, shipped. Pay remaining 50%.

Try: “A patient management system for SA clinics” · “AI SaaS for property management”

PRD Generated — Ready to Build

10%
40%
50%
2–4 wks
Building...0%

Ptah Builder™ active · CodeRabbit reviewing · Vercel standing by

⚡

Pi + Cursor Agents

🚀

Every product shipped. Every URL live. No mockups.

Agent Skills

Agent Skills

Pre-installed on every Dark Factory VM. Each skill earns agents new capabilities.

graphify
Graphify-Labs/graphify
1 skill

Maps any codebase to a navigable knowledge graph. Community detection, audit trails, cross-repo linking. Natural language query.

Natural language query · Shortest path · Community detection · Neo4j export

Capability:Codebase Intelligence
obsidian-mind
eugeniughelbur/obsidian-second-brain
18 skills

Persistent memory vault. Session start injects context, brain dumps after meetings, semantic search over all history.

Session Start · Brain Dump · /om-standup · /om-weekly · 18 commands

Capability:Agent Memory
gstack
garrytan/gstack
38 skills

YC sprint process. /office-hours, /plan, /build, /review, /qa, /ship, /retro. Real Chromium browser for end-to-end testing.

/office-hours · /build · /review · /qa · /ship · /retro

Capability:Sprint Engineering

24 skills

Capability:Production Engineering

Capability:Market Intelligence
headroom
chopratejas/headroom
1 skill

60–95% token compression. Cross-agent memory transfer. Failure mining with pattern detection.

Capability:Token Efficiency
spec-kit
github/spec-kit
9 skills

GitHub SDD toolkit. /speckit.specify → /plan → /tasks → /implement. Spec-driven development.

/speckit.specify · /plan · /tasks · /implement

Capability:Spec-Driven Dev
skill-creator
anthropics/skills/skill-creator
1 skill

Build new skills recursively. Test, benchmark, improve, package. The agent that builds agents.

Recursive skill building · Test · Benchmark · Package

Capability:Meta-Skill Builder

graphify — Codebase Knowledge Graphs

Maps any codebase to a navigable graph. Query with natural language. Export to Neo4j or FalkorDB.

$ graphify src/ --mode deep --wiki
→ Building graph... 847 nodes — 2,341 edges — 12 communities
→ graphify-out/wiki/ written. 24 articles.
→ Natural language query
→ Shortest path analysis
→ Community detection
→ Neo4j / FalkorDB export

obsidian-mind — Persistent Agent Memory

18 commands. Hooks for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI. Session start loads context automatically.

→ Session Start — reads North Star before every session
→ Brain Dump — updates org/people + work/active after meetings
→ /om-standup · /om-weekly · /om-review-brief — 18 commands total
